title: nephrodium serra
intro: Nephrodium serra, also known as the Serra Fern or Serra Lycopodium, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the fern family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium serra include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium serra can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
